features: 【Energy Saving and Super Bright】Amdelne led light batten adopts the latest design, 6000K bright daylight white illumination, coupled with 180° wide angle beam design greatly improves the luminous efficiency, this LED plug in light only needs 16 watts, can provide 1760LM high brightness output, for you to save up to 70% of the electricity bill.

【Connectable and Easy To Use】This newest 1.3FT led batten light can be connected with up to 33 lamps, you can choose the right wiring position according to your own use scenario, the included 47 inches long connecting cable can add more lamps, beautiful and atmospheric! Meanwhile, this led garage lighting tube comes with a plug and switch, more convenient to use.

【Widely Used】IP65 workshop lighting LED shop light with plug is the best choice for wet locations (indoor or outdoor).180° wide beam angle and provides a wide range of illumination. Suitable for residential, commercial and industrial lighting, such as bathrooms, bedrooms, kitchens, corridors, garages, warehouses, basements, offices, shops, supermarkets and more.

【Plug And Play, Easy Installation】The LED wardrobe light can be plug and play or hardwired to a wall switch. Comes with mounting accessories, just follow our user manual for quick and easy installation, you can mount the cabinet light on the wall or ceiling according to your needs; workshop lighting can easily light up all garages and workshops.

【Newest Design】This LED tube light fixture can provide even super bright light, unique shape and design to ensure that the lamps are moisture-proof, waterproof, dust-proof, can prevent short-circuiting, and can work properly in high humidity environments such as bathrooms, laundries and outdoor areas, ensuring that it can be used safely.
【Our Service】if there are any problems with the product, please feel free to contact us, we are at your service 24 hours a day.
description: Product Description Amdelne LED Batten Light (40cm/120cm/150cm, 6000K) 1. Amdelne LED Batten Light has an energy efficiency rating of ‘E’. 2. Amdelne LED Batten Lights are flicker-free and glare-free, providing you with a healthier lighting environment. 3. Amdelne LED Batten Light can be fitted with plugs or connecting cables (L120cm) without the need for screws, saving you a lot of installation time and cost. Individual installation The 2-prong plug with an in-line switch which turns lights plugged into it on and off! The plug cable is 2.5M long enough for you to use. Seamless connection The close coupler for smooshing multiple fixtures together without using the double-ended cable between them. With wire connection The double-ended cable for linking more lights. The middle cable is 1.2M, long enough for you to connect. IP65 Waterproof LED Batten Light is made of waterproof material, IP65 waterproof LED light tube for outdoor and indoor, can deal with shower room, bathroom outdoor and other wet environment, effective protection against water vapour, water droplets, anti-dust interference Easy to install LED Batten Light comes with a full range of accessories and can be mounted vertically or horizontally on walls and ceilings, making installation very easy As office lighting Plug and play or direct wiring. The new technology of LED lamps can save you up to 85% on your electricity bill. As large warehouse lighting LED Batten Light is suitable for all kinds of places: garages, workshops, storage rooms, equipment rooms, workplaces, porches and courtyards, warehouses, basements, plazas, offices, wardrobes, laundry rooms and other types of places.
